What's up guys, for the Black Friday promotion from Prestige, this is a pretty straightforward play. On Black Friday, we're going to be offering a deal where you buy any one bundle and you get one product free, excluding protein. And we have announcements for your coaches to make in classes, as well as Facebook lives and things for you to promote it. You do want to spend about one week prior to this building excitement, getting people ready to do this deal. Now also, for the poster, we've actually got an entire module on the day after Thanksgiving, making an open workout or a free thing, but then you get to push product and say, hey guys, don't forget we have this special today. There's a lot of ways you can do this, but if the simplest form, you're going to have a link, you're going to have a code, people order the deal, they get their subs, they get an awesome deal, you make sales and everybody's happy. So check out the modules and sell some subs.
